mapper.select: SELECT no, id, title, writer, content, created_at, updated_at FROM post ORDER BY no DESC
SELECT no, id, title, writer, content, created_at, updated_at FROM post WHERE no = #{no}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post ( id, title, writer, content ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{title}, #{writer}, #{content} )
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET title = #{title}, writer = #{writer}, content = #{content}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE no = #{no}
